2026-0192
2026-03-03PMOPublic Service Employment ActAppointment of the Associate Deputy Minister of National DefenceAppointment of Kevin Brosseau of Ottawa, Ontario, Commissioner of Canada's Fight Against Fentanyl, to be concurrently Associate Deputy Minister of National Defence, to be styled Senior Associate Deputy Minister of National Defence and Commissioner of the Canadian Coast Guard, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Associate Deputy Minister of National Defence
precis: Appointment of Kevin Brosseau of Ottawa, Ontario, Commissioner of Canada's Fight Against Fentanyl, to be concurrently Associate Deputy Minister of National Defence, to be styled Senior Associate Deputy Minister of National Defence and Commissioner of the Canadian Coast Guard, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.
